name: @lexmapa/datavalidation
description: Validacion, auditoria y promocion de datos legales candidatos para LexMapa.

scripts.review:example: node scripts/record-review-decision.mjs --candidate examples/candidate-bundle.example.json --validation-report data/reports/validation-report.example.generated.json --decision REQUEST_REVIEW --reviewer lexmapa-dev --notes "Example review decision" --output data/review/example-review-decision.generated.json
